# railway_private_network (Resource)

Railway private network. Creates a private network in a specific environment for internal service-to-service communication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "railway_private_network" "internal" {
  project_id     = railway_project.example.id
  environment_id = railway_project.example.default_environment.id
  name           = "internal"

  # Optional
  # tags = ["backend"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) Identifier of the environment the private network belongs to.
- `name` (String) Name of the private network.

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) Identifier of the project the private network belongs to. Required for creation, populated automatically on import.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the private network.

### Read-Only

- `dns_name` (String) DNS name of the private network.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the private network (publicId).
- `network_id` (Number) Numeric network identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import by environment_id:network_public_id
tofu import railway_private_network.internal your-environment-id:your-network-public-id
```
